description_long: This object consists of four distinct candles, each mounted on a round, metallic-looking base. The candles vary in shape and height: two are tall and slender, one is shorter and slightly wider, and the last is a squat, cylindrical pillar. All candles are a pale yellow color, with visible black wicks at the top, and the bases have a copper or bronze metallic sheen. The surfaces of the candles appear smooth and unblemished, with no visible wax drips or burn marks. The bases are flat and wide, providing stability and a decorative accent to the candles, making them suitable for display in urban environments such as cafes, parks, or public event spaces.
description: A set of four pale yellow candles of varying heights and shapes, each on a round metallic base with visible wicks and smooth surfaces.
description_view_0: Four candles of different heights and shapes are lined up side by side, all on round metallic bases, with wicks visible at the top.
description_view_1: The candles are viewed from the side, appearing stacked in a line, showing the round bases and the varying heights from tallest to shortest.
description_view_2: The candles are seen from the opposite side, with the squat pillar candle now on the left and the tallest on the right, all bases and wicks visible.
description_view_3: A rear view of the candles, showing the alignment of the bases and the relative thickness of each candle, with the pillar candle most prominent.
